---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

Example: "When using API2MCP with GraphQL APIs that have nested union types, the
generated tool descriptions are missing the sub-type schemas, which makes it hard
for the LLM to call the tool correctly."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Use Case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be useful. The more specific,
the better — real examples help maintainers understand the impact.

## Would You Like to Implement This?

- [ ] Yes, I would like to submit a pull request for this
- [ ] No, I am requesting it for someone else to implement

## Additional Context

Any links, references, spec examples, or other context that might help.
